captions.formal: A whimsical, animated scene depicts white rabbits and a cat with butterfly wings relaxing and standing joyfully in a sunny, purple-flowered green meadow.
captions.sarcastic: Because nothing says "normal" like a cat wearing butterfly wings hanging out with white rabbits in a suspiciously perfect, sunny meadow full of purple flowers.
captions.humorous_tech: Rendering complete: White rabbits and a winged cat avatar spawn in a high-res sunny meadow. Purple flower assets loaded. Whimsy engine running at maximum joy settings.
